steps.title: Link absorption to soil decrease
steps.content: The plant absorbs and safely stores iron from polluted soil. The next clause says iron concentrations in the soil decrease. The blank should mark the decrease as the expected result of the plant's absorption.

steps.title: Choose a result transition
steps.content: Choice A introduces a more specific detail, but the second clause gives a consequence. Choice C signals contrast, though the decrease follows logically from absorption. Choice D adds parallel information, but the sentence needs cause and effect. The transition meaning as a result fits. The answer is B.
